location_notes: Two clinics on the outskirts of Bamako, capital of Mali; placed at Bamako city centroid.
District hospital outpatient clinics in Kilifi, coastal Kenya; placed at Kilifi town centroid.
A clinic in the town of Karonga, Malawi; placed at Karonga town centroid.
time_notes: Samples collected in 1995 and 1996; paper does not disaggregate by year so a single combined survey spanning the 2-year window is used. Midpoint set to 1996-01-01.
